---
title: "The Rev. Henry Gordon Merriman"
---

## The Rev. Henry Gordon Merriman

**Dates:** (1823/4-1887)

### Description

headmaster of the Royal Grammar School, Guildford

### Biography

He married (1852) Jane Augusta Edmonds. They were friends of Lewis Carroll's. [census returns, death and marriage index]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
